description: An LLM-powered framework for repository-level code documentation generation. Note: RepoAgent is primarily an open-source tool/library, not a traditional directory service.

how_to_contribute.action: Set up development environment using PDM (Python Development Master)
Make changes and submit a Pull Request (PR)

installation_methods.github_actions: Available via actions/run-repoagent GitHub Marketplace action

configuration_requirements.api_key: OpenAI API key required (set as OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable)

features: Generates documentation via AST code analysis
Pre-commit hook integration for automated documentation updates
